title: ABC9 `cell->parameters.empty()' failed in passes/techmap/abc9_ops.cc:460
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Using [testcase.il](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/6329982/testcase.zip), run `synth_ecp5 -abc9 -dff`.

## Expected behavior

Synthesis completes successfully.

## Actual behavior

```
2.45.6. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).
ERROR: Assert `cell->parameters.empty()' failed in passes/techmap/abc9_ops.cc:460.
```

I'll also paste this, which seems relevant:

```
2.45.4. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).
Warning: Whitebox '$paramod$7bb25b92394f21507f99ccfd37aa82194be10574\TRELLIS_FF' with (* abc9_flop *) contains a $dff cell with non-zero initial state -- this is not supported for ABC9 sequential synthesis. Treating as a blackbox.
```

cc @eddiehung
code_blocks:
2.45.6. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).
ERROR: Assert `cell->parameters.empty()' failed in passes/techmap/abc9_ops.cc:460.

2.45.4. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).
Warning: Whitebox '$paramod$7bb25b92394f21507f99ccfd37aa82194be10574\TRELLIS_FF' with (* abc9_flop *) contains a $dff cell with non-zero initial state -- this is not supported for ABC9 sequential synthesis. Treating as a blackbox.
